title: Laptop Cannot Connect to Corporate Wi-Fi

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Laptop not connecting to CorpNet wireless network
servicenow_seed.description: A remote employee's laptop stopped connecting to CorpNet after a Windows update last night. Other employees on the same floor are connecting fine. The user has restarted once already.

correct_steps: Validate the caller and confirm the device name / asset tag
Ask the user to open Network Settings and forget the CorpNet profile
Have user run ipconfig /flushdns and ipconfig /release + /renew
Check Device Manager for yellow flags on the wireless adapter
Reinstall wireless driver if flagged, or roll back the update driver
Confirm user connects successfully and document the fix
rationale: Single-user wireless issues after a Windows update are typically a Tier 1 driver or profile reset. No need to escalate unless the driver rollback fails or more users are affected.
